name: 反派流放懲罰型
description: 反派被逐一懲罰——前男友被扔火山、冒牌千金流放北極十年、叛變下屬自我流放。這種「惡有惡報」的結尾給觀眾提供最後一波解氣的情緒釋放。
tags: 結尾前段——婚禮完成前的清場

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: She should be sent to the North Pole for 10 years. / Brandt. Throw him in a volcano. / I'll send myself to the North Pole and make sure the golden corpse thrives there. And I won't come back unless you love me.
examples.context: 結尾前段——婚禮完成前的清場
